---
title: "About"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/marios-choudetsanakis/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/machoude
---

```{=html}
<div style="max-width:580px;margin:0 auto 2rem;">
  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.68rem;color:#1DB954;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1rem;">
    About this project
  </div>
```

**DataScouteR** is a football analytics platform that applies statistical modelling and empirical backtesting to evaluate transfer decisions across 25+ European leagues.
